workerSheet.noWorkers: No workers yet. Train your first in the Kaserne.

settings.mockDataSubtitle: Simulates 2 weeks of running, cycling & strength workouts

sell.confirmSubtitle: Review what happens when you sell this building.

warning.storage_cap_reduced: Storage capacity reduced — some resources will be lost.
warning.food_production_lost: Food production stops — workers will go hungry!
warning.bonus_lost: Production bonus from {{building}} will be lost.
warning.worker_unassigned: Assigned worker will return to idle.
warning.pending_collected: Pending resources will be collected before sale.

construction.buildKaserne: Build a Kaserne to train workers

defense.title: Defense
defense.subtitle: Your Total Defense
defense.animalsHint: Assign animals: tap an animal in the collection
defense.tipIdleAnimals: 🐾 {{count}} animal(s) can be assigned to defense

waves.tipPartial: Tip: Assign more animals to defense and train regularly!
waves.tipOverrun: Tip: Build Walls and Watchtowers, and train daily for more defense points!
waves.tipAssignAnimals: Assign animals to defense for more VP!
waves.tipTrainToday: Train today — every workout minute gives you VP!
waves.tipSpaehfalke: Assign the Scout Falcon to defense — it reduces monster AP by 10%!
waves.tipBuildDefense: Build Walls and Watchtowers for more base VP!
waves.tipStreak: Keep your workout streak going for bonus VP!

erntehuhn.name: Harvest Chicken
erntehuhn.flavor: Eagerly pecks at the grains lying next to the field. Tireless and a bit dumb.

lastesel.name: Pack Donkey
lastesel.flavor: Patiently carries everything loaded onto it. Never complains — at least not audibly.

holzbaer.name: Timber Bear
holzbaer.flavor: Rips entire tree trunks from the earth with its paws. Surprisingly gentle — as long as you feed it.

spaehfalke.name: Scout Falcon
spaehfalke.flavor: Circles high above the village and sees everything. Its piercing cry warns of approaching danger.

steinbock.name: Mountain Goat
steinbock.flavor: Climbs rocks no human could scale. Its fur is as hard as the stone itself.

mystischerHirsch.name: Mystic Stag
mystischerHirsch.flavor: Its antlers glow silver at dusk. Where it stands, the grass grows faster.
mystischerHirsch.ability: Healing aura: Repairs 5% building damage after attack

kriegswolf.name: War Wolf
kriegswolf.flavor: Its yellow eyes study every stranger. It follows only the strongest — and that's you.
kriegswolf.ability: Pack tactics: All animals in defense +10% VP

gluecksphoenixt.name: Lucky Phoenix
gluecksphoenixt.flavor: Born from ashes, bathed in flames. Its fire doesn't destroy — it renews.
gluecksphoenixt.ability: Rebirth: Once per wave instantly repairs a destroyed building

uralterDrache.name: Ancient Dragon
uralterDrache.flavor: The legends spoke of it. For centuries it slept beneath the mountain. Your fighting spirit awakened it.
uralterDrache.ability: Dragon breath: Instantly destroys 30% of the monster wave

animalSection.title: Assigned Animal
animalSection.noneHint: Assign an animal for a production bonus
animalSection.defenseHint: Assign animals: tap an animal in the collection

muskelmasse.what: The primary currency — earned through real training.
muskelmasse.how: Track workouts via Apple Health. More intensity = more Muskelmasse.

food.use: Without food, workers go inactive and stop collecting.

streakTokens.how: Earn one token each day you train. Bonus at 3- and 7-day streaks.
streakTokens.use: Special buildings like Temple and Library.

rathaus.name: Town Hall
rathaus.description: The heart of your village. Upgrade it to unlock new buildings.

2.effect: Unlocks Barracks, Quarry, Stone Warehouse and Watchtower

3.effect: Unlocks Temple, Library, Marketplace and Wall

holzfaeller.name: Lumberjack
holzfaeller.description: Continuously produces wood to keep your construction supplied.

steinbruch.name: Quarry
steinbruch.description: Extracts stone from the earth for advanced building projects.

proteinfarm.name: Protein Farm
proteinfarm.description: Slowly produces Protein — the rarest and most valuable resource.

feld.name: Field
feld.description: Grows food to keep your workers fed and productive.

holzlager.name: Wood Warehouse
holzlager.description: Increases your maximum Wood storage capacity.

steinlager.name: Stone Warehouse
steinlager.description: Increases your maximum Stone storage capacity.

nahrungslager.name: Food Warehouse
nahrungslager.description: Increases your maximum Food storage capacity.

kaserne.name: Barracks
kaserne.description: Trains new workers and houses your workforce.

tempel.name: Temple
tempel.description: Channels your workout streak into powerful production bonuses.

4.effect: +20% Muskelmasse from steps + Shield every 14 days

bibliothek.name: Library
bibliothek.description: Unlocks research that improves every aspect of your realm.

marktplatz.name: Marketplace
marktplatz.description: Trade surplus resources with other tribes for what you need.

stammeshaus.name: Tribal Hall
stammeshaus.description: The ultimate symbol of tribal prestige and endgame power.

stall.name: Stable
stall.description: Houses animals and grants production bonuses to nearby buildings.

wachturm.name: Watchtower
wachturm.description: Provides early warning of monster waves and reduces attacker strength.

mauer.name: Wall
mauer.description: Absorbs damage and protects your settlement from monster attacks.

1.name: The Forest
1.description: A dense forest full of resources waiting to be gathered.

2.name: The Mountains
2.description: Rugged mountain terrain rich with stone and rare minerals.

3.name: The Ruins
3.description: Ancient ruins hiding forgotten treasures and artefacts.

4.name: The Swamp
4.description: A murky swamp teeming with hidden dangers and rare finds.

5.name: The Ice Desert
5.description: A frozen wasteland that only the most dedicated athletes can endure.

6.name: The Summit
6.description: The ultimate summit — conquer it to prove your dominance.

stall.adjacencyBonus: Next to Field → Animals produce +10% food passively

animalSheet.releaseMessage: Do you really want to release {{name}}? This action cannot be undone.

onboarding.welcomeDesc: Turn your real workouts into resources and build your own village. The harder you train, the stronger your realm becomes.
onboarding.conceptDesc: Every real workout generates Muskelmasse and resources. Collect them, build structures, and defend your village against monster waves.
onboarding.dataSubtitle: We use this to calculate your personal HRmax and intensity zones.
onboarding.focusSubtitle: Choose what matters most to you. Your primary goal determines how your rewards are weighted.
onboarding.focusStepsDesc: Daily steps are your main goal
onboarding.focusWorkoutsDesc: Training minutes are your main goal
onboarding.focusCaloriesDesc: Active calories are your main goal
onboarding.resultExplain: Your HRmax is used to precisely evaluate workout intensity. Workouts above 70% HRmax count as intense.

auth.subtitle: Your fitness kingdom awaits
auth.switchToLogin: Already have an account? Log in
auth.appleNoToken: Apple Sign-In failed: no token received.
auth.googleNoToken: Google Sign-In failed: no token received.
auth.forgotPasswordEnterEmail: Please enter your email address above first.
auth.forgotPasswordSent: We've sent you a password reset email.

migration.conflictSubtitle: Two game states exist. Choose the one you want to keep.
